summary: Tested Next.js migration fixes for LaunchPath platform. Fixed a critical bug: pages/tools/index.jsx had wrong import path for ToolsIndexPage. Changed from '../src/pages/ToolsIndexPage' to '../../src/pages/ToolsIndexPage'. This was causing a build error that cascaded to 500 errors on /tools, /products/confirmed, and ERR_ABORTED on /admission/confirmed and /ground-0-complete. After fix all pages load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: pages/tools/index.jsx had incorrect import path '../src/pages/ToolsIndexPage' (should be '../../src/pages/ToolsIndexPage') - FIXED by testing agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tested pages working: homepage (SSR, OG meta tags, navbar), /program, /compliance-library, /tools, /admission/confirmed, /products/confirmed, /ground-0-complete. The tools import path fix was applied.

page_results.homepage: PASS - Title, OG tags (og:title, og:description, og:image), navbar all present
